faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offer best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

reviews_list.review_title: College for the pharmacy - I am satisfied with the college study and the faculty's interaction.

review_content.Placements: It's the new college so the placement is not set yet or the percentage of placements. It's the medical college in Jabalpur. It's new but the study is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college course is good, and the study is good. The infrastructure is good for a new college. Campus is well cleaned and new building is around it. There is also a playground.

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is average because the college is newly opened. There are fewer facilities for Wi-Fi in the classroom. Cameras are available in this college. There are no facilities available for the hostel. There is a playground available.

review_content.Placements: It is a government school. Emami Paper Factory offers students an opportunity to join them from the school. Emami Orchestrate a little camp and is the best one. I ought to get ready for railroads. Overall, it still a great college, in my opinion. If you want placements, then you have to choose another college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Great facilities and infrastructure are provided in the college. It has a well-equipped library, hostel facilities with a capacity of 140 students, 4 labs, and Wi-Fi. Understudies dwelling in the hostel will be viewed immediately by the superintendent. All lights should be turned off by 11 pm. The average quality of food is provided in the hostel. We have a canteen inside the college which provides great quality food. Medical facilities are available. A playground and great sports facilities are available.

reviews_list.review_title: Not satisfied with campus, infrastructure, hostel facilites and surroundings.

review_content.Placements: About 65 percent of students got placement in our batch. The highest packege was 65, 000, the lowest was 20,000 and average was 35,000. SBI DRDO, ISRO and other private sectors. About 55-60 percent got internship in companies like BioBharti life Science limited. Research analyst, Lab technician and Consulting physicist etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are not neat and clean. No Wi-Fi facility. Labs are not fully developed like less equipments. Hostels are less clean and food serves is very low quality. Other facilities like electricity and washrooms are very bad. Facilities like canteen, medical and games are not available.
